channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 69/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 69/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 51.5%.

item.title: Novara Media: Why Is the Labour Right Desperate to Rehash Brexit?
item.description: Why Is the Labour Right Desperate to Rehash Brexit?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer’s opponents are paving way for Labour’s destruction, Lammy warns
item.description: Starmer’s opponents are paving way for Labour’s destruction, Lammy warns

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Lammy dismisses Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU as ‘sixth form’ debating position – UK politics live
item.description: Lammy dismisses Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU as ‘sixth form’ debating position – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Andy Burnham's appeal to the country and to Labour members have the same two causes: his talents as a political performer, and 'Manchesterism'. The thing is, though, the version of 'Manchesterism' that has actually be...
item.description: Andy Burnham's appeal to the country and to Labour members have the same two causes: his talents as a political performer, and 'Manchesterism'. The thing is, though, the version of 'Manchesterism' that has actually be...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Tories should make pact with Reform in bid to defeat Burnham in by-election, Jacob Rees-Mogg suggests
item.description: Tories should make pact with Reform in bid to defeat Burnham in by-election, Jacob Rees-Mogg suggests

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham allies accuse Streeting of sabotage over call for UK to rejoin EU
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham allies accuse Streeting of sabotage over call for UK to rejoin EU

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer is not setting out timetable for his departure, says David Lammy - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Bracing start to the morning as two guys behind me on the train segue seamlessly from discussing the building job they are doing in Golders Green to antisemitic conspiracy theories. Apparently, Edward I has the right ...
